chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR. Crl. Misc. Application No. S- 260 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE Hearing of case. 1. For orders on MA No. 2379/2023 (U/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 04.03.2024. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. -.-.-.- The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application under section 497 Cr.P.C has sought for cancellation of pre-arrest bail granted to the private respondents by learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge Naushahro Feroze. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant Criminal Misc. Application for its disposal on merits provided the applicant is permitted to seek cancellation of the bail to the private respondent by filing such application before learned trial Court as he has misused the concession of bail. The instant Criminal Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed. However the applicant may seek cancellation of bail to the private respondent by filing such application before learned trial Court, if it is permitted by law. JUDGE Irfan/PA

However the applicant may seek cancellation of bail to the private respondent by filing such application before learned trial Court, if it is permitted by law. JUDGE Irfan/PA ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR. Crl. Misc. Application No. S- 261 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at Flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No. 2377/2023 (U/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 04.03.2024. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. -.-.-.- The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application under section 497 Cr.P.C has sought for cancellation of pre-arrest bail granted to the private respondents by learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge Naushahro Feroze. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant Criminal Misc. Application for its disposal on merits provided the applicant is permitted to seek cancellation of the bail to the private respondent by filing such application before learned trial Court as he has misused the concession of bail. The instant Criminal Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed. However the applicant may seek cancellation of bail to the private respondent by filing such application before learned trial Court, if it is permitted by law. JUDGE Irfan/PA
